heroDesc: The ultimate digital shield built for the next generation. Master the internet, protect your data, and level up your security skills. Designed for legends aged 9-15.
missionDesc: The digital world is your playground, but even the best explorers need gear. CHEA turns complex cybersecurity into a tactical game. No boring manuals—just high-tech gadgets and smart training to keep you ahead of hackers and safe from online traps.
gadgetsSubtitle: Equip your digital arsenal with tools built for elite performance.
gadget1Desc: Instant deep-scan for links and files. Know if it's safe before you click.
gadget2Desc: Forge unhackable passwords that even a supercomputer couldn't crack.
gadget3Desc: End-to-end encrypted messaging. For your eyes and your team's eyes only.
gadget4Desc: Ultra-secure credential storage. Locked behind multi-layer bio-auth.
trainingSubtitle: Don't just use tools. Master the skills.
phishingDojoDesc: Spot the traps, dodge the bait.
quizArenaDesc: Duel with friends, climb the ladder.
aiSidekickDesc: Never feel alone on your mission. CHEA's built-in AI assistant is ready 24/7 to answer your tech questions, help you analyze suspicious links, and provide tactical advice for staying safe.
startTrainingDesc: Join thousands of young defenders securing the digital frontier. Free to download, easy to master.
